segments.text: Racking up tons of damage through multi-hit combos, working toward the stock - that's the gameplan
segments.original_text: 触れた回数ダメージコンボをいっぱい稼いで撃墜までというイメージで

segments.text: Acola's Steve, though, shows off that bold, one-shot KO power
segments.original_text: アコラ選手側のスティーブは何か大胆な一発の撃墜力というのを見せてくれるようなイメージがありますが

full_text: Racking up tons of damage through multi-hit combos, working toward the stock - that's the gameplan Acola's Steve, though, shows off that bold, one-shot KO power And there it is!

corrections.original: 振れて回数ダメージコンボ
corrections.corrected: 触れた回数ダメージコンボ
